query:
-- First, mark all as available (activa=1)
UPDATE paradas SET activa = 1;

-- Then mark as occupied (activa=0) if producto is valid (not NULL and not in exclusion list)
UPDATE paradas 
SET activa = 0 
WHERE producto IS NOT NULL 
  AND UPPER(TRIM(producto)) NOT IN ('REMOVIDA', 'APAGADO', 'NO DISPLAY', '');

-- Show summary
SELECT 
  activa,
  CASE WHEN activa = 1 THEN 'Disponible' ELSE 'Ocupada' END as estado,
  COUNT(*) as cantidad
FROM paradas
GROUP BY activa
ORDER BY activa DESC;
